title: Simplest Broadaxes
description: Tiered broadaxes capable of cutting down a tree at once
body:
# About

**Tired of endless cutting down trees in Minecraft? Use a broadaxe**

This mod adds broadaxes that function like axes but instead of one block, they are able to cut down an entire tree at once which greatly simplifies deforestation in the middle and late stages of the game.

# How It Works

To obtain a broadaxe, you must first find a new smithing template to upgrade your axe. It can be found in villages: most often in the weaponsmiths, toolsmiths, and armorers houses, less often in regular houses. 

Using a smithing template and a block of appropriate material on a smithing table, you can upgrade your axe to a brand new broadaxe.

![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01ecf4aaf874529e940cb3a73b97aa6f721d40dd.png)

Additionally, this mod adds a new trimming enchantment specifically for broadaxes that allows you to cut down all leaves from a tree at once.

## FAQ

**Q:** Will you port Simplest Broadaxes to Fabric?\
**A:** No, we usually only use Neoforge

**Q:** Will you back-port Simplest Broadaxes to X version?\
**A:** No, we don't usually back-port
